name: Despair
description: Used by The Stalker, Despair throwing blades have a mono-filament edge, sharp enough to penetrate a Warframe.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Used by The Stalker, Despair throwing blades have a mono-filament edge, sharp enough to penetrate a Warframe.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Concealed Explosives not dealing explosive damage to nearby enemies when directly hit when equipped on Spira, Kunai, Hikou, Fusilai, or Despair.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tarock Thrown Blade Skin not sitting properly in some cases when equipped on Spira, Spira Prime, or Despair.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Despair appearing to be thrown backwards when using Ivara’s Navigator ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted the location of Despair when holstered.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Despair, the Hikou series and the AkStiletto are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: New Single-Sword Stance: Vengeful Revenant! Hate... Dread... Despair…!

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Despair using the wrong audio FX on impact.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Adjustments made to Kunai and Despair holster to remove redundant visual attachments.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Text corrections for Orokin Cells, Dread, Despair & Hate .

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed weapon attachments (Kunai/Despair holsters) that would detach from player while using a sniper rifle.
Fixed/removed off-hand flashlight when using Despair.
